endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{datacenterConnector}:upgradeAppliance
endpoints.description: Upgrades the appliance relate to this DatacenterConnector to the in-place updateable version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DATACENTERCONNECTOR}} with a real datacenterconnector.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{group}:addGroupMigration
endpoints.description: Adds a MigratingVm to a Group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{GROUP}} with a real group.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{group}:removeGroupMigration
endpoints.description: Removes a MigratingVm from a Group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{GROUP}} with a real group.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{migratingVm}:finalizeMigration
endpoints.description: Marks a migration as completed, deleting migration resources that are no longer being used. Only applicable after cutover is done.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MIGRATINGVM}} with a real migratingvm.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{migratingVm}:pauseMigration
endpoints.description: Pauses a migration for a VM. If cycle tasks are running they will be cancelled, preserving source task data. Further replication cycles will not be triggered while the VM is paused.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MIGRATINGVM}} with a real migratingvm.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{migratingVm}:resumeMigration
endpoints.description: Resumes a migration for a VM. When called on a paused migration, will start the process of uploading data and creating snapshots; when called on a completed cut-over migration, will update the migration to active state and start the process of uploading data and creating snapshots.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MIGRATINGVM}} with a real migratingvm.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{migratingVm}:startMigration
endpoints.description: Starts migration for a VM. Starts the process of uploading data and creating snapshots, in replication cycles scheduled by the policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{MIGRATINGVM}} with a real migratingvm.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets details of a single TargetProject. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1alpha1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a single TargetProject. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1alpha1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the parameters of a single TargetProject. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{name}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{name}/operations
endpoints.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Initiates the cancellation of a running cutover job.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/cloneJobs
endpoints.description: Lists CloneJobs of a given migrating VM.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/cloneJobs
endpoints.description: Initiates a Clone of a specific migrating VM.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/cutoverJobs
endpoints.description: Lists CutoverJobs of a given migrating VM.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/cutoverJobs
endpoints.description: Initiates a Cutover of a specific migrating VM. The returned LRO is completed when the cutover job resource is created and the job is initiated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/datacenterConnectors
endpoints.description: Lists DatacenterConnectors in a given Source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/datacenterConnectors
endpoints.description: Creates a new DatacenterConnector in a given Source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/groups
endpoints.description: Lists Groups in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/groups
endpoints.description: Creates a new Group in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/migratingVms
endpoints.description: Lists MigratingVms in a given Source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/migratingVms
endpoints.description: Creates a new MigratingVm in a given Source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/replicationCycles
endpoints.description: Lists ReplicationCycles in a given MigratingVM.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/sources
endpoints.description: Lists Sources in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/sources
endpoints.description: Creates a new Source in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/targetProjects
endpoints.description: Lists TargetProjects in a given project. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/targetProjects
endpoints.description: Creates a new TargetProject in a given project. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{parent}/utilizationReports
endpoints.description: Lists Utilization Reports of the given Source.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1alpha1/{parent}/utilizationReports
endpoints.description: Creates a new UtilizationReport.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1alpha1/{source}:fetchInventory
endpoints.description: List remote source's inventory of VMs. The remote source is the onprem vCenter (remote in the sense it's not in Compute Engine). The inventory describes the list of existing VMs in that source. Note that this operation lists the VMs on the remote source, as opposed to listing the MigratingVms resources in the vmmigration service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCE}} with a real source.
